metadata.description: Eser KUBALI's Claude Code plugin marketplace: grounded, repo-aware planning and audit/hardening tools.

plugins.name: qb
plugins.description: Repo-aware, gated, multi-step project planning workflow for Claude Code: master plan, autopsy, phase decomposition, coverage/quality audit, and gated implementation. Produces English Planner-docs/; in-session and zero-setup.

plugins.name: planwright
plugins.description: Grounded codebase planning for AI coding agents, packaged for Claude Code: audits your repository and writes a verification-ready checkbox plan where every step is checkable.
